title: pilosella apatelia subsp. carpathorum
intro: Pilosella apatelia subsp. carpathorum, also known as a subspecies of the Pilosella apatelia plant, is a type of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). It is traditionally used in folk medicine to treat various health issues due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Pilosella apatelia subsp. carpathorum include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
